description: Overview We develop customised, enterprise-grade solutions to empower businesses to effectively communicate and engage with their customers via their digital channels. We have 2 offices in Malaysia, which are Kuala Lumpur & Kota Kinabalu. We aim to provide top-notch tech solutions with data and strategy to elevate our client's customers' digital experience. We provide the following services to our clients: Technology Consultation, Custom Development, UI/UX Website Development, Mobile Apps Development, DevOps. Learn more about us at our website www.dataflows.co Job Responsibilities Design, develop and maintain automated workflows using n8n and similar automation platforms Build and integrate APIs to connect various business systems and data sources Develop Python scripts for data processing, transformation and automation tasks Collaborate with clients to understand their business processes and identify automation opportunities Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments Create documentation for workflows, integrations and technical processes Monitor and troubleshoot automated systems to ensure reliability and performance Work closely with the development team to integrate automation solutions with existing applications Stay updated on emerging automation tools, AI technologies and best practices Job Requirement Diploma or Bachelor Degree in Computer Science or related field. Fresh graduates are welcome to apply. Foundation in n8n workflow automation platform Foundation in Python programming skills (APIs, data processing, scripting) Foundation in data science and machine learning concepts Able to work independently to solve technical problems while maintaining clear communication as a team. Exceptionally detail-oriented with strong debugging skills. Excellent communication and strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Familiarity with REST APIs and webhook integrations Basic understanding of databases (SQL/NoSQL) Experience with version control systems (Git) Interest in AI/ML tools and their practical business applications Benefits Hybrid Working Arrangement EPF, SOCSO & EIS Entitlement of various leaves such as Annual Leave, Medical Leave, Compassionate Leave, Paternity Leave, Maternity Leave etc. Fun Working Environment Career Growth Opportunities
